notes: Page is JavaScript-rendered (AngularJS). WebFetch was blocked in this environment, so a Playwright browser session was used. The static HTML alone does not contain the restaurant data.

TasteAtlas auto-rotates the /wheretoeat hub through related pizza variants (apizza, pizza-napoletana, new-york-style-pizza, chicago-pizza, detroit-style-pizza, etc.) shortly after page load via JS timers. To capture the canonical Traditional Italian Pizza list, timers had to be killed immediately after navigation. The data above was captured from the stable canonical URL https://www.tasteatlas.com/traditional-italian-pizza/wheretoeat with H1 'The best Traditional Italian Pizza in the world'.

The list page renders exactly 10 ranked restaurants. A 'LOAD MORE' control exists in the DOM but every attempt to click it was preempted by the auto-rotation redirecting to a sibling pizza page; the initial 10 items appear to be the full top-10 list TasteAtlas displays for this dish in the 'In The World' tab. There may be additional entries behind LOAD MORE that could not be captured here.

No 1-5 star score is shown on the list view for individual places. The underlying Angular scope exposes an 'AggregatedScore' integer (e.g. 166490) and 'CriticCount', but no per-place 1-5 rating is rendered. Rating set to null for every place. The page presents places strictly as a ranked top-10 list.

Addresses captured are the short street-name strings as displayed on the list cards (e.g. 'Viale di Trastevere'), not full postal addresses. Full postal addresses (including postcodes) live on each place's detail page and were not fetched here.
detail_url values are constructed from the relative UrlLink shown on each card (e.g. href='AiMarmi' -> https://www.tasteatlas.com/AiMarmi). These resolve to TasteAtlas place pages.
City/country were parsed from the card text 'CITY, COUNTRY' line and normalized to title case; the raw page renders them in uppercase.
All 10 entries are in Italy; 9 in Rome and 1 in Naples — consistent with TasteAtlas treating 'Traditional Italian Pizza' primarily as Roman-style pizza tonda.
